skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: One face of a rectangular panel has an area of 615 square inches. If a pressure of 23 pounds per square inch is exerted on this face of the panel, what is the total force, in pounds, exerted on this face of the panel?
rationale: The correct answer is 14,145. The total force equals area times pressure: 615 · 23 = 14,145 pounds.
